dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eZKTeco device captures a face/fingerprint event → stored in device's internal log.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003ePython service polls the device every N seconds via ZK protocol (port 4370).\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eNew records are queued in a local SQLite DB (survives backend outages).\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eA background sync worker POSTs batches to the C# backend \u003ccode\u003e/api/attendance/sync\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eBackend validates, de-duplicates, writes to SQL Server, recomputes daily summaries.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eBackend broadcasts the new record to all dashboard clients via SignalR.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eDashboard receives the event in real time and updates KPIs + table.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ol\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eProject 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eThe ZKTeco ZK wire protocol (port 4370) is well-supported by the \u003ccode\u003epyzk\u003c/code\u003e library in Python, but no mature C# implementation exists. Running the device bridge in Python keeps the protocol code robust, while the C# backend handles all business logic, persistence, and the dashboard.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003ePort clarification\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-port-clarification\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: Port clarification\" href=\"#port-clarification\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eMany ZKTeco docs reference port \u003cstrong\u003e5200\u003c/strong\u003e — this is the \u003cem\u003eHTTP/web interface\u003c/em\u003e port used by the device's admin UI. The binary ZK protocol used for attendance polling runs on port \u003cstrong\u003e4370\u003c/strong\u003e. The original Python code in this repo used 5200 in error; this has been corrected.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eReliability features\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-reliability-features\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: Reliability features\" href=\"#reliability-features\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003ePersistent queue\u003c/strong\u003e: All records are written to SQLite before being sent to the backend. If the backend is down, records accumulate safely.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eRetry with backoff\u003c/strong\u003e: Failed sync attempts are retried up to N times with exponential backoff.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDe-duplication\u003c/strong\u003e: Records are uniquely keyed by (UserId, Timestamp, DeviceSerial). The backend skips duplicates.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eMulti-device\u003c/strong\u003e: One thread per device, so a slow device doesn't block others.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eHealthcheck\u003c/strong\u003e: HTTP endpoint on port 8080 returns service status for monitoring.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eGraceful shutdown\u003c/strong\u003e: SIGINT/SIGTERM handlers ensure in-flight records complete.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eUser ID mapping\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-user-id-mapping\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: User ID mapping\" href=\"#user-id-mapping\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eZKTeco devices use their own internal UID for each enrolled user. The backend uses an integer \u003ccode\u003eUserId\u003c/code\u003e. By default, the service assumes these match 1:1 — but if they don't, use \u003ccode\u003euser_map\u003c/code\u003e in \u003ccode\u003econfig.yaml\u003c/code\u003e:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e101\u003c/span\u003e   \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e#\u003c/span\u003e device UID 1 → backend UserId 101\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e102\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003e3\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e103\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" web admin panel at \u003ccode\u003ehttp://\u0026lt;device-ip\u0026gt;\u003c/code\u003e (default port 80, login admin/admin).\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eVerify the port\u003c/strong\u003e: Use 4370, not 5200. From the host running Python, run:\n\u003cdiv class=\"snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"telnet 192.168.1.100 4370\"\u003e\u003cpre class=\"notranslate\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003etelnet 192.168.1.100 4370\n\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\nYou should see a blank connection (not \"Connection refused\").\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFirewall\u003c/strong\u003e: Allow inbound/outbound on port 4370 on both the device host and the Python service host.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eCommunication password\u003c/strong\u003e: If the device has a password set, put it in \u003ccode\u003econfig.yaml\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003epassword\u003c/code\u003e field.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eForce UDP\u003c/strong\u003e: Some firmware only responds to UDP. Set \u003ccode\u003eforce_udp: true\u003c/code\u003e in \u003ccode\u003econfig.yaml\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ol\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eBackend returns 401/403\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-backend-returns-401403\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: Backend returns 401/403\" href=\"#backend-returns-401403\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eIf you enabled \u003ccode\u003eSecurity:RequireApiKey\u003c/code\u003e in Web.config, the Python service must send the matching key. dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eIn Visual Studio: right-click the project → \u003cstrong\u003ePublish\u003c/strong\u003e → \u003cstrong\u003eIIS, FTP, publish folder, set the app pool to \u003cstrong\u003eNo Managed Code\u003c/strong\u003e (OWIN self-hosts).\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSet the app pool identity to a domain account with SQL Server access (or use SQL auth).\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSet \u003ccode\u003edebug=false\u003c/code\u003e in \u003ccode\u003eWeb.config\u003c/code\u003e and tighten CORS to specific origins.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSet a strong \u003ccode\u003eSecurity:ApiKey\u003c/code\u003e and flip \u003ccode\u003eSecurity:RequireApiKey\u003c/code\u003e to \u003ccode\u003etrue\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ol\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" <p dir="auto">A complete attendance management solution for ZKTeco MB2000 (and similar ZK-protocol) face/fingerprint devices. Built with <strong>C# .NET Framework 4.7.2 + Entity Framework 6 + SQL Server</strong> for the backend, <strong>Python 3</strong> for device communication, and a <strong>responsive HTML/JS dashboard</strong> for live monitoring.</p>
<hr>

<p dir="auto"><strong>Data flow:</strong></p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>ZKTeco device captures a face/fingerprint event → stored in device's internal log.</li>
<li>Python service polls the device every N seconds via ZK protocol (port 4370).</li>
<li>New records are queued in a local SQLite DB (survives backend outages).</li>
<li>A background sync worker POSTs batches to the C# backend <code>/api/attendance/sync</code>.</li>
<li>Backend validates, de-duplicates, writes to SQL Server, recomputes daily summaries.</li>
<li>Backend broadcasts the new record to all dashboard clients via SignalR.</li>
<li>Dashboard receives the event in real time and updates KPIs + table.</li>
</ol>
<hr>

<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Visual Studio 2019/2022</strong> (Community Edition is fine) OR <code>dotnet</code> CLI with .NET Framework 4.7.2 SDK</li>

</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Python Service</h3><a id="user-content-python-service" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Python Service" href="#python-service"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Python 3.8+</strong> (3.10 or 3.11 recommended)</li>
<li>Network access to the ZKTeco device on TCP port <strong>4370</strong> (NOT 5200 — see <a href="#port-clarification">note below</a>)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">ZKTeco Device</h3><a id="user-content-zkteco-device" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: ZKTeco Device" href="#zkteco-device"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>ZKTeco MB2000 (or any ZK-protocol device: SpeedFace, F22, iClock, etc.)</li>
<li>Device configured with a static IP on the same network as the Python service host</li>
<li>Device's "Communication Password" must match <code>password</code> in <code>config.yaml</code> (0 = no password)</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 1 — Database</h3><a id="user-content-step-1--database" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 1 — Database" href="#step-1--database"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Open SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS) and connect to your SQL Server instance.</li>
<li>Open <code>database/schema.sql</code> and execute it (F5).</li>
<li>Verify the <code>AttendanceDB</code> database was created with tables: <code>Users</code>, <code>Devices</code>, <code>AttendanceRecords</code>, <code>AccessLogs</code>, <code>AttendanceSummaries</code>.</li>
<li>Update the connection string in <code>backend/AttendanceSystem/Web.config</code>:</li>
</ol>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 2 — C# Backend</h3><a id="user-content-step-2--c-backend" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 2 — C# Backend" href="#step-2--c-backend"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Open <code>backend/AttendanceSystem.sln</code> in Visual Studio.</li>
<li>Right-click the solution → <strong>Restore NuGet Packages</strong> (or run <code>nuget restore</code> from CLI).</li>
<li>Build the solution (Ctrl+Shift+B). This should produce no errors.</li>
<li>Set the project as startup project and press F5 to run with IIS Express.</li>
<li>The API will be available at <code>http://localhost:5000/</code>.</li>
<li>The dashboard will be served at <code>http://localhost:5000/</code> (root URL).</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Verify the API is running by visiting <code>http://localhost:5000/api/users</code> — you should see the seed users (John Doe, Jane Smith, Bob Johnson).</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 3 — Python Service</h3><a id="user-content-step-3--python-service" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 3 — Python Service" href="#step-3--python-service"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Install Python 3.8+ from <a href="https://www.python.org/downloads/" rel="nofollow">python.org</a> (ensure it's added to PATH).</li>
<li>Open a terminal in <code>python-service/</code>:</li>
</ol>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c1">cd</span> python-service
pip install -r requirements.txt</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

pip install -r requirements.txt" tabindex="0" role="button">

<ol start="3" dir="auto">
<li>Copy <code>config.yaml.example</code> to <code>config.yaml</code> (a default <code>config.yaml</code> is already provided) and edit it:</li>
</ol>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-ent">devices</span>:
  - <span class="pl-ent">ip</span>: <span class="pl-s">192.168.1.100          </span><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Your device IP</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">port</span>: <span class="pl-c1">4370</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">serial_number</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>ZKT001<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    <span class="pl-ent">location</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Main Entrance<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>

<span class="pl-ent">backend</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">url</span>: <span class="pl-s">http://localhost:5000</span>

<span class="pl-ent">service</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">poll_interval_seconds</span>: <span class="pl-c1">60</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="devices:
  - ip: 192.168.1.100          # Your device IP
    port: 4370
    serial_number: "ZKT001"
    location: "Main Entrance"

backend:
  url: http://localhost:5000

service:
  poll_interval_seconds: 60" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 4 — Dashboard</h3><a id="user-content-step-4--dashboard" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 4 — Dashboard" href="#step-4--dashboard"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Open <code>http://localhost:5000/</code> in any modern browser.</li>
<li>The dashboard shows:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>KPI cards (Active Users, Checked-In, Late, Absent)</li>
<li>Live attendance table (updates via SignalR in real time)</li>
<li>User management tab</li>
<li>Monthly report tab</li>
<li>Device registry tab</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Configuration</h2><a id="user-content-configuration" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Configuration" href="#configuration"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Web.config (C# Backend)</h3><a id="user-content-webconfig-c-backend" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Web.config (C# Backend)" href="#webconfig-c-backend"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Section</th>
<th>Key</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>connectionStrings</code></td>
<td><code>AttendanceConnection</code></td>
<td>SQL Server connection string</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>appSettings</code></td>
<td><code>ZKTeco:DeviceIP</code></td>
<td>Device IP (informational; actual polling is in Python)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>appSettings</code></td>
<td><code>ZKTeco:DevicePort</code></td>
<td>Device port (use 4370 for pyzk)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>appSettings</code></td>
<td><code>API:Port</code></td>
<td>Backend HTTP port (default 5000)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>appSettings</code></td>
<td><code>Policy:LateThreshold</code></td>
<td>Late check-in cutoff (default 09:15)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>appSettings</code></td>
<td><code>Policy:EarlyLeaveThreshold</code></td>
<td>Early leave cutoff (default 17:00)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>appSettings</code></td>
<td><code>Policy:HalfDayMinimumHours</code></td>
<td>Min hours for full-day (default 4)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>appSettings</code></td>
<td><code>Security:ApiKey</code></td>
<td>Optional shared secret; if <code>RequireApiKey=true</code>, clients must send <code>X-API-Key</code> header</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">config.yaml (Python Service)</h3><a id="user-content-configyaml-python-service" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: config.yaml (Python Service)" href="#configyaml-python-service"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Key</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>devices[]</code></td>
<td>List of devices to poll (one thread per device)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>devices[].ip</code></td>
<td>Device IP</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>devices[].port</code></td>
<td>Device port (4370 for pyzk)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>devices[].password</code></td>
<td>Communication password (0 if none)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>devices[].force_udp</code></td>
<td>Use UDP instead of TCP (some firmware requires it)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>backend.url</code></td>
<td>C# API base URL</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>backend.api_key</code></td>
<td>Must match <code>Security:ApiKey</code> in Web.config if enabled</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>backend.retry_attempts</code></td>
<td>Sync retry count</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>service.poll_interval_seconds</code></td>
<td>How often to poll each device</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>service.queue_db_path</code></td>
<td>SQLite queue file path</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>service.capture_images</code></td>
<td>Attempt to capture face snapshots (slow, optional)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>service.healthcheck_port</code></td>
<td>HTTP health endpoint port (0 to disable)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>user_map</code></td>
<td>Map device-side UID → backend UserId (optional; if omitted, 1:1)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Running the System</h2><a id="user-content-running-the-system" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Running the System" href="#running-the-system"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Development</h3><a id="user-content-development" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Development" href="#development"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Start SQL Server.</li>
<li>Start the C# backend in Visual Studio (F5) → <a href="http://localhost:5000" rel="nofollow">http://localhost:5000</a>.</li>
<li>Start the Python service: <code>python zkteco_service.py --config config.yaml</code>.</li>
<li>Open the dashboard: <a href="http://localhost:5000/" rel="nofollow">http://localhost:5000/</a>.</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Production (Windows Service)</h3><a id="user-content-production-windows-service" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Production (Windows Service)" href="#production-windows-service"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The Python service can be installed as a Windows Service using <code>nssm</code>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>nssm install ZKTecoService <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>C:\Python311\python.exe<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>C:\attendance-system\python-service\zkteco_service.py<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>--config<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>C:\attendance-system\python-service\config.yaml<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
nssm start ZKTecoService</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="nssm install ZKTecoService "C:\Python311\python.exe" "C:\attendance-system\python-service\zkteco_service.py" "--config" "C:\attendance-system\python-service\config.yaml"
nssm start ZKTecoService" tabindex="0" role="button">

<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Method</th>
<th>Endpoint</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>POST</code></td>
<td><code>/api/attendance/sync</code></td>
<td>Bulk-sync records from device (called by Python service)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>POST</code></td>
<td><code>/api/attendance/checkin</code></td>
<td>Record a single check-in/out event</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GET</code></td>
<td><code>/api/attendance/today</code></td>
<td>List today's attendance events (live dashboard)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GET</code></td>
<td><code>/api/attendance/summary/{userId}/{date}</code></td>
<td>Daily summary for a user</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GET</code></td>
<td><code>/api/attendance/records/{userId}?startDate=&endDate=</code></td>
<td>Records for a user in a date range</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GET</code></td>
<td><code>/api/attendance/report/monthly?year=&month=&department=</code></td>
<td>Monthly aggregated report</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GET</code></td>
<td><code>/api/attendance/report/daily?date=&department=</code></td>
<td>Daily report for all users</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GET</code></td>
<td><code>/api/attendance/report/user/{userId}?startDate=&endDate=</code></td>
<td>Per-user detailed report</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GET</code></td>
<td><code>/api/attendance/dashboard-stats</code></td>
<td>KPI counts for the dashboard</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Users</h3><a id="user-content-users" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Users" href="#users"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Method</th>
<th>Endpoint</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>GET</code></td>
<td><code>/api/users</code></td>
<td>List all active users</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GET</code></td>
<td><code>/api/users/{userId}</code></td>
<td>Get user by ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GET</code></td>
<td><code>/api/users/employee/{employeeId}</code></td>
<td>Get user by Employee ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GET</code></td>
<td><code>/api/users/{userId}/photo</code></td>
<td>Download user's profile photo</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>POST</code></td>
<td><code>/api/users</code></td>
<td>Create new user</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PUT</code></td>
<td><code>/api/users/{userId}</code></td>
<td>Update user</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PUT</code></td>
<td><code>/api/users/{userId}/biometric</code></td>
<td>Upload biometric template / photo</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Database Schema</h2><a id="user-content-database-schema" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Database Schema" href="#database-schema"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Five tables, three indexes per table on average, two reporting views, one stored procedure for rebuilding summaries.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Tables</h3><a id="user-content-tables" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Tables" href="#tables"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Users</strong> — Employees enrolled on the device</li>
<li><strong>Devices</strong> — Registered ZKTeco devices</li>
<li><strong>AttendanceRecords</strong> — Raw check-in/out events</li>
<li><strong>AccessLogs</strong> — Access granted/denied events</li>
<li><strong>AttendanceSummaries</strong> — Daily rollup (one row per user per day)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Views</h3><a id="user-content-views" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Views" href="#views"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>vw_MonthlyAttendanceReport</code> — Monthly aggregate per user</li>
<li><code>vw_DailyAttendanceStatus</code> — Daily status with friendly labels</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Stored Procedure</h3><a id="user-content-stored-procedure" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Stored Procedure" href="#stored-procedure"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>sp_RebuildDailySummaries @StartDate, @EndDate</code> — Re-derive summaries from raw records (useful when attendance policy changes)</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">Full schema is in <code>database/schema.sql</code>.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Python Service Details</h2><a id="user-content-python-service-details" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Python Service Details" href="#python-service-details"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Why a separate Python service?</h3><a id="user-content-why-a-separate-python-service" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Why a separate Python service?" href="#why-a-separate-python-service"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The ZKTeco ZK wire protocol (port 4370) is well-supported by the <code>pyzk</code> library in Python, but no mature C# implementation exists. Running the device bridge in Python keeps the protocol code robust, while the C# backend handles all business logic, persistence, and the dashboard.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Port clarification</h3><a id="user-content-port-clarification" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Port clarification" href="#port-clarification"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Many ZKTeco docs reference port <strong>5200</strong> — this is the <em>HTTP/web interface</em> port used by the device's admin UI. The binary ZK protocol used for attendance polling runs on port <strong>4370</strong>. The original Python code in this repo used 5200 in error; this has been corrected.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Reliability features</h3><a id="user-content-reliability-features" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Reliability features" href="#reliability-features"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Persistent queue</strong>: All records are written to SQLite before being sent to the backend. If the backend is down, records accumulate safely.</li>
<li><strong>Retry with backoff</strong>: Failed sync attempts are retried up to N times with exponential backoff.</li>
<li><strong>De-duplication</strong>: Records are uniquely keyed by (UserId, Timestamp, DeviceSerial). The backend skips duplicates.</li>
<li><strong>Multi-device</strong>: One thread per device, so a slow device doesn't block others.</li>
<li><strong>Healthcheck</strong>: HTTP endpoint on port 8080 returns service status for monitoring.</li>
<li><strong>Graceful shutdown</strong>: SIGINT/SIGTERM handlers ensure in-flight records complete.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">User ID mapping</h3><a id="user-content-user-id-mapping" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: User ID mapping" href="#user-id-mapping"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">ZKTeco devices use their own internal UID for each enrolled user. The backend uses an integer <code>UserId</code>. By default, the service assumes these match 1:1 — but if they don't, use <code>user_map</code> in <code>config.yaml</code>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-ent">user_map</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">1</span>: <span class="pl-c1">101</span>   <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> device UID 1 → backend UserId 101</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">2</span>: <span class="pl-c1">102</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">3</span>: <span class="pl-c1">103</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="user_map:
  1: 101   # device UID 1 → backend UserId 101
  2: 102
  3: 103" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Troubleshooting</h2><a id="user-content-troubleshooting" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Troubleshooting" href="#troubleshooting"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Python service cannot connect to device</h3><a id="user-content-python-service-cannot-connect-to-device" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Python service cannot connect to device" href="#python-service-cannot-connect-to-device"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>Verify the device IP</strong>: Open the device's web admin panel at <code>http://<device-ip></code> (default port 80, login admin/admin).</li>
<li><strong>Verify the port</strong>: Use 4370, not 5200. From the host running Python, run:
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto"><pre class="notranslate"><code>telnet 192.168.1.100 4370
</code></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="telnet 192.168.1.100 4370" tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">
    <path d="M0 6.75C0 5.784.784 5 1.75 5h1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-1.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v1.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 16h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 14.25Z"></path><path d="M5 1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h7.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 11h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 5 9.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Z"></path>
</svg>
      <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-check js-clipboard-check-icon color-fg-success d-none">
    <path d="M13.78 4.22a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.06l-7.25 7.25a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06 0L2.22 9.28a.751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018L6 10.94l6.72-6.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    </clipboard-copy>
  </div></div>
You should see a blank connection (not "Connection refused").</li>
<li><strong>Firewall</strong>: Allow inbound/outbound on port 4370 on both the device host and the Python service host.</li>
<li><strong>Communication password</strong>: If the device has a password set, put it in <code>config.yaml</code> <code>password</code> field.</li>
<li><strong>Force UDP</strong>: Some firmware only responds to UDP. Set <code>force_udp: true</code> in <code>config.yaml</code>.</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Backend returns 401/403</h3><a id="user-content-backend-returns-401403" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Backend returns 401/403" href="#backend-returns-401403"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">If you enabled <code>Security:RequireApiKey</code> in Web.config, the Python service must send the matching key. Set <code>backend.api_key</code> in <code>config.yaml</code> to the same value.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">SignalR real-time updates not appearing</h3><a id="user-content-signalr-real-time-updates-not-appearing" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: SignalR real-time updates not appearing" href="#signalr-real-time-updates-not-appearing"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Open browser dev tools → Console. Look for SignalR errors.</li>
<li>Verify <code>/signalr</code> endpoint is reachable: <code>http://localhost:5000/signalr/negotiate</code> should return JSON.</li>
<li>Check that <code>Microsoft.AspNet.SignalR</code> NuGet package is installed.</li>
<li>Restart the backend — Unity DI registration happens once at startup.</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Database connection failures</h3><a id="user-content-database-connection-failures" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Database connection failures" href="#database-connection-failures"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Verify SQL Server is running: <code>services.msc</code> → look for <code>SQL Server (MSSQLSERVER)</code>.</li>
<li>Test the connection string from SSMS using the same credentials.</li>
<li>Ensure <code>MultipleActiveResultSets=True</code> is in the connection string (EF6 needs this for lazy loading).</li>
<li>If using LocalDB, ensure the <code>(localdb)\MSSQLLocalDB</code> instance is installed.</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Daily summaries not updating</h3><a id="user-content-daily-summaries-not-updating" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Daily summaries not updating" href="#daily-summaries-not-updating"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Summaries are recomputed automatically when new records arrive.</li>
<li>If policy values changed in Web.config, you need to backfill historical summaries:
<div class="highlight highlight-source-sql notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>EXEC sp_RebuildDailySummaries @StartDate <span class="pl-k">=</span> <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>2026-01-01<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>, @EndDate <span class="pl-k">=</span> <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>2026-12-31<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>;</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="EXEC sp_RebuildDailySummaries @StartDate = '2026-01-01', @EndDate = '2026-12-31';" tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">
    <path d="M0 6.75C0 5.784.784 5 1.75 5h1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-1.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v1.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 16h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 14.25Z"></path><path d="M5 1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h7.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 11h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 5 9.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Z"></path>
</svg>
      <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-check js-clipboard-check-icon color-fg-success d-none">
    <path d="M13.78 4.22a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.06l-7.25 7.25a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06 0L2.22 9.28a.751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018L6 10.94l6.72-6.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    </clipboard-copy>
  </div></div>
</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Production Deployment</h2><a id="user-content-production-deployment" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Production Deployment" href="#production-deployment"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Backend (IIS)</h3><a id="user-content-backend-iis" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Backend (IIS)" href="#backend-iis"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>In Visual Studio: right-click the project → <strong>Publish</strong> → <strong>IIS, FTP, Folder</strong>.</li>
<li>Target: IIS server with .NET Framework 4.7.2 installed.</li>
<li>In IIS Manager: create a new site, point it at the publish folder, set the app pool to <strong>No Managed Code</strong> (OWIN self-hosts).</li>
<li>Set the app pool identity to a domain account with SQL Server access (or use SQL auth).</li>
<li>Set <code>debug=false</code> in <code>Web.config</code> and tighten CORS to specific origins.</li>
<li>Set a strong <code>Security:ApiKey</code> and flip <code>Security:RequireApiKey</code> to <code>true</code>.</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Python Service (Windows Service)</h3><a id="user-content-python-service-windows-service" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Python Service (Windows Service)" href="#python-service-windows-service"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Install <a href="https://nssm.cc/" rel="nofollow">NSSM</a>: <code>choco install nssm</code> (or download manually).</li>
<li>Install Python deps system-wide: <code>pip install -r requirements.txt</code>.</li>
<li>Register the service:
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>nssm install ZKTecoService <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>C:\Python311\python.exe<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>C:\prod\python-service\zkteco_service.py<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>--config<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>C:\prod\python-service\config.yaml<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
nssm <span class="pl-c1">set</span> ZKTecoService AppDirectory <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>C:\prod\python-service<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
nssm <span class="pl-c1">set</span> ZKTecoService AppStdout <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>C:\prod\python-service\stdout.log<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
nssm <span class="pl-c1">set</span> ZKTecoService AppStderr <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>C:\prod\python-service\stderr.log<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
nssm <span class="pl-c1">set</span> ZKTecoService Start SERVICE_AUTO_START
nssm start ZKTecoService</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="nssm install ZKTecoService "C:\Python311\python.exe" "C:\prod\python-service\zkteco_service.py" "--config" "C:\prod\python-service\config.yaml"
nssm set ZKTecoService AppDirectory "C:\prod\python-service"
nssm set ZKTecoService AppStdout "C:\prod\python-service\stdout.log"
nssm set ZKTecoService AppStderr "C:\prod\python-service\stderr.log"
nssm set ZKTecoService Start SERVICE_AUTO_START
nssm start ZKTecoService" tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">
    <path d="M0 6.75C0 5.784.784 5 1.75 5h1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-1.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v1.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 16h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 14.25Z"></path><path d="M5 1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h7.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 11h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 5 9.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Z"></path>
</svg>
      <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-check js-clipboard-check-icon color-fg-success d-none">
    <path d="M13.78 4.22a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.06l-7.25 7.25a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06 0L2.22 9.28a.751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018L6 10.94l6.72-6.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    </clipboard-copy>
  </div></div>
</li>
<li>Verify with: <code>sc query ZKTecoService</code> and check <code>http://localhost:8080/health</code>.</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Monitoring</h3><a id="user-content-monitoring" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Monitoring" href="#monitoring"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Healthcheck: <code>http://<python-host>:8080/health</code> returns JSON with poll counts and sync failures.</li>
<li>IIS logs: <code>%SystemDrive%\inetpub\logs\LogFiles\</code></li>
<li>Python logs: <code>python-service/zkteco_service.log</code> (rotating, 10 MB × 5 files).</li>
<li>SQL Server: standard SQL Server error log + Agent alerts.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Backups</h3><a id="user-content-backups" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Backups" href="#backups"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Database</strong>: Full nightly backup + 15-min transaction log backups.</li>
<li><strong>Python queue</strong>: <code>queue.sqlite</code> — backup if records may not have synced yet.</li>
<li><strong>Device logs</strong>: ZKTeco devices have limited internal storage; rely on the database for history.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">License</h2><a id="user-content-license" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: License" href="#license"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

</article></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="prc-PageLayout-PaneWrapper-pHPop pr-2" style="--offset-header:0px;--spacing-row:var(--spacing-none);--spacing-column:var(--spacing-none)" data-is-hidden="false" data-position="end"><div class="prc-PageLayout-HorizontalDivider-JLVqp prc-PageLayout-PaneHorizontalDivider-9tbnE" data-component="PageLayout.HorizontalDivider" data-variant-narrow="none" data-variant-regular="none" data-position="end" style="--spacing-divider:var(--spacing-none);--spacing:var(--spacing-none)"></div><div class="prc-PageLayout-Pane-AyzHK" data-component="PageLayout.Pane" style="--spacing:var(--spacing-normal);--pane-min-width:256px;--pane-max-width:calc(100vw - var(--pane-max-width-diff));--pane-width-size:var(--pane-width-large);--pane-width:320px"><rails-partial data-partial-name="codeViewTreeRoute.Sidebar" class="RailsPartial-module__d-contents__G5m4w">
